stemHtml: Cruising IFR in uncontrolled airspace at 2600 ft. Is this permitted?

options.a: Yes, if the competent authority uses flight levels from 3000 ft and above.
options.b: Yes, if transition altitude is below 3000 ft.
options.c: No, IFR below 3000 ft is not allowed.
options.d: No, should be at FL20 or FL30.
